description_long: This is a compact, stylized airplane with a metallic silver fuselage and a prominent yellow nose cone. The wings are short and straight, featuring black text and simple black stripes for visual detail. The propeller is mounted at the front, with two visible blades and a central hub. The landing gear consists of two main wheels positioned under the wings and a smaller tail wheel. The cockpit is situated just behind the nose, with a blue-tinted canopy that appears to be single-seat and enclosed. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and a horizontal stabilizer, both integrated smoothly into the fuselage.
description: A small, silver airplane with a yellow nose, front propeller, and short straight wings with black markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow nose cone, two-blade propeller, and both main landing gear wheels under the wings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the short, straight wing, blue-tinted cockpit canopy, and the tail section with a single vertical stabilizer.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail assembly, both wings, and the overall compact shape of the airplane.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the yellow nose, cockpit canopy, and the right wing with visible text and markings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with straight, short wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and a single nose wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, single-seat, enclosed cockpit with a blue-tinted canopy.
